title: Minecraft But Andesite Drops OP Items!
description: This is a datapack I made for a minecraft manhunt video where andesite drops overpowered items!
body:
This datapack makes andesite drop extremely overpowered items such as enchanted diamond tools, armor, elytras, totems of undying, and even enchanted golden apples!

You can use this data pack in minecraft manhunts, in minecraft challenges or servers to make the game a lot easier to beat. If you use it in a youtube video I would appreciate if you include a link to this datapack in the description or pinned comment :)

This is a mod I made for a minecraft manhunt youtube video.

Also if the datapack says it needs a newer or an older version just enable it anyway it should work (I don't know why but it does that sometimes).
